title: cryptocarya adpressa
intro: Cryptocarya adpressa, also known as the Queensland walnut, is a species of evergreen tree native to the subtropical regions of northern Queensland in Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cryptocarya adpressa include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in herbal infusions and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
